title: bradburya schiedeana
intro: Bradburya schiedeana, also known as Mexican prickly poppy, is a plant species native to Mexico, belonging to the family Papaveraceae. The medicinal properties of Bradburya schiedeana include its anti-inflammatory, analgesic, and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to relieve pain, reduce inflammation, and treat various skin conditions, such as wounds and eczema. Herbal preparations of Bradburya schiedeana are often made into tinctures, teas, or ointments, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
